positive: A retro-futuristic depiction of a chrome-plated cyberpunk cityscape viewed from a rooftop at night. Neon signs advertise fictional goods, flying vehicles streak through the smog, and the style incorporates vaporwave aesthetics with high contrast lighting and saturated cyan and magenta colors.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, natural landscape, pastoral, grainy
